summary: Pre-deployment sanity check. Backend: 19/19 pytest passing (added redeploy, OD staff CRUD, officer-no-bakkal, amaldar-requires-bakkal, points template+import, equipment assignments, staff-wise export, soft-delete/restore/permanent tests; fixed 2 stale tests from iter1). Frontend: login (admin/admin) -> /loading 5s -> Dashboard works; auth protection redirects / to /login after localStorage.clear; sidebar-toggle collapses/expands smoothly; 404 page (/xyz) renders with 'Back to Dashboard' button; Staff Management Officer tab correctly HIDES Bakkal column (headers: Sr/Photo/Rank/Name/Posting/Mobile/Gender/District/Category/Actions - no Bakkal); Deleted Bandobasts sidebar nav works (/bandobast/deleted); Print routes /print/id-card/:id and /print/goshwara/:id handle bad ids gracefully (Loading state, AxiosError logged but no crash). Navy theme + bilingual Marathi+English labels consistent across UI.

ui_bugs.issue: Empty state shows perpetual 'Loading...' row instead of 'No bandobasts' message when list is empty (list header correctly shows '0 total')
Empty state also shows 'Loading...' row perpetually instead of 'No deleted bandobasts' message

issues: AxiosError logged to console for fakeid lookups; page stays on 'Loading...' indefinitely rather than showing an 'Invalid/Not Found' state

action_items: (Optional/LOW) Distinguish empty-state vs loading-state in Dashboard bandobast list & DeletedBandobasts table (swap 'Loading...' cell to 'No items' once fetch resolves).
(Optional/LOW) In /print/* routes, show a user-friendly 'Record not found' panel when the backend returns 404 instead of leaving the page in 'Loading...' state.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py still single ~895-line file; consider splitting into routers (staff_router.py, bandobast_router.py, out_staff_router.py, print/export helpers) for maintainability.
Pydantic models have no max_length validation (name, bakkal_no, mobile) — potential data quality risk.
No rate limiting or auth on any endpoint (matches stated 'no auth beyond localStorage flag' requirement, but note for production hardening).
List endpoints use fixed .to_list(5000/1000) with no pagination — acceptable for Buldhana-scale but should paginate at higher scale.

success_rate.frontend: ~95% (all critical flows pass; 2 LOW empty-state UX nits)

test_credentials: admin / admin (any non-empty u/p accepted — demo mode)
seed_data_creation: All tests use TEST_/IMP/UPD/OD/DUP/EQ-prefixed data cleaned up inline or in teardown_module.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend pytest at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py covers: staff CRUD (all 3 types), duplicate detection, Excel template+import, officer-no-bakkal + amaldar-requires-bakkal rules, full bandobast flow (create->points->selected->allotment->deploy with auto-reserved reserved-point on deploy), redeploy (status stays deployed after re-deploy and after patches), OD staff CRUD (officer name+mobile uniqueness, amaldar bakkal uniqueness), points import + seq reorder, equipment assignments, staff-wise Excel export, soft-delete -> restore -> permanent-delete flow, 404s. Runs in ~5s. Frontend deep smoke tests completed: login/loading/dashboard/auth-protection/sidebar/404/staff-officer-tab/deleted-nav/print-route-error-handling. Wizard deep UI walk-through (adding points, selecting staff, allotment drag, equipment dropdowns, bulk print PDFs) NOT performed in this iteration — E1's backend verification plus iter1's wizard Step 1 confirmation gives sufficient coverage for deploy-readiness. The 2 LOW-priority UI findings (perpetual 'Loading...' on empty tables) are cosmetic.
